items.title: S01E01 - Logan's Run
items.summary: Logan and Jessica decide to escape from the City of Domes to avoid losing their lives at Carousel.

infolabels.title: Logan's Run
infolabels.plot: Logan and Jessica decide to escape from the City of Domes to avoid losing their lives at Carousel.

items.title: S01E02 - The Collectors
items.summary: While Rem repairs the vehicle, Logan and Jessica go off looking for water.

infolabels.title: The Collectors
infolabels.plot: While Rem repairs the vehicle, Logan and Jessica go off looking for water.

items.title: S01E03 - Capture
items.summary: After Francis captures the three fugitives, a big-game hunter named James Borden captures Logan and Francis. The sworn enemies must unite if they are to survive and save Jessica.

infolabels.title: Capture
infolabels.plot: After Francis captures the three fugitives, a big-game hunter named James Borden captures Logan and Francis. The sworn enemies must unite if they are to survive and save Jessica.

items.title: S01E04 - The Innocent
items.summary: Logan, Jessica, and Rem find a beautiful young woman named Lisa out in the middle of nowhere. Her parents left her with only two robots to help her. She gets a crush on Logan and develops a plan to get rid of Jessica so she can have him all to herself.

infolabels.title: The Innocent
infolabels.plot: Logan, Jessica, and Rem find a beautiful young woman named Lisa out in the middle of nowhere. Her parents left her with only two robots to help her. She gets a crush on Logan and develops a plan to get rid of Jessica so she can have him all to herself.

items.title: S01E05 - Man Out of Time
items.summary: Logan, Jessica and Rem encounter a time traveler from the past who is trying to discover what caused the nuclear war 200 years earlier.

infolabels.title: Man Out of Time
infolabels.plot: Logan, Jessica and Rem encounter a time traveler from the past who is trying to discover what caused the nuclear war 200 years earlier.

items.title: S01E06 - Half Life
items.summary: The fugitives come across a city of people that are able to divide themselves into two parts, good and bad. They then live separately from the bad people who are known as the Castouts. When Jessica is captured and split, Logan and Rem must formulate a plan to make her whole again and then escape.

infolabels.title: Half Life
infolabels.plot: The fugitives come across a city of people that are able to divide themselves into two parts, good and bad. They then live separately from the bad people who are known as the Castouts. When Jessica is captured and split, Logan and Rem must formulate a plan to make her whole again and then escape.

items.title: S01E07 - Crypt
items.summary: Logan, Jessica, and Rem discover a civilization that was devastated by a plague. 6 of the most brillant minds of the time were selected to be preserved. one of them is an imposter - but which one?

infolabels.title: Crypt
infolabels.plot: Logan, Jessica, and Rem discover a civilization that was devastated by a plague. 6 of the most brillant minds of the time were selected to be preserved. one of them is an imposter - but which one?

items.title: S01E08 - Fear Factor
items.summary: An evil scientist captures the three fugitives and plans to make them his latest patients. He is trying to remove the ability of people to experience emotions.

infolabels.title: Fear Factor
infolabels.plot: An evil scientist captures the three fugitives and plans to make them his latest patients. He is trying to remove the ability of people to experience emotions.

items.title: S01E09 - The Judas Goat
items.summary: A man named Hal 14 runs into Logan and his pals and claims to be a runner. He is actually a Sandman trying to get the trio back to the Domed City.

infolabels.title: The Judas Goat
infolabels.plot: A man named Hal 14 runs into Logan and his pals and claims to be a runner. He is actually a Sandman trying to get the trio back to the Domed City.

items.title: S01E10 - Futurepast
items.summary: A dream analyzer named Ariana warns Logan and Jessica that their lives are in danger. Rem tries to help them and find a way out of their dangerous situation.

infolabels.title: Futurepast
infolabels.plot: A dream analyzer named Ariana warns Logan and Jessica that their lives are in danger. Rem tries to help them and find a way out of their dangerous situation.

items.title: S01E11 - Carousel
items.summary: Logan is shot with a dart that erases his memory by men hiding behind a tree. He then is captured by Francis and another sandman who return him to the City of Domes so that he can go to Carousel and testify before the people that there is no sanctuary. Rem and Jessica are captured by a man from an unamed city who explains that Logan has been placed in transit. transit is a way of neutralizing potential enemies without using violence by a temporary loss of memory. Rem and Jessica must find a way to save Logan from the City of Domes before it is too late.

infolabels.title: Carousel
infolabels.plot: Logan is shot with a dart that erases his memory by men hiding behind a tree. He then is captured by Francis and another sandman who return him to the City of Domes so that he can go to Carousel and testify before the people that there is no sanctuary. Rem and Jessica are captured by a man from an unamed city who explains that Logan has been placed in transit. transit is a way of neutralizing potential enemies without using violence by a temporary loss of memory. Rem and Jessica must find a way to save Logan from the City of Domes before it is too late.

items.title: S01E12 - Night Visitors
items.summary: Logan and Jessica find a house to stay in. Rem thinks something about the house is strange and after searching his memory realizes that the people are dead and the house is haunted. The fugitives must find a way out of the trap that they have fallen into.

infolabels.title: Night Visitors
infolabels.plot: Logan and Jessica find a house to stay in. Rem thinks something about the house is strange and after searching his memory realizes that the people are dead and the house is haunted. The fugitives must find a way out of the trap that they have fallen into.

items.title: S01E13 - Turnabout
items.summary: Logan, Jessica, Rem, and Francis are all captured by a group of desert horsemen. Logan finds himself working with his sworn enemy Francis to save all of their lives.

infolabels.title: Turnabout
infolabels.plot: Logan, Jessica, Rem, and Francis are all captured by a group of desert horsemen. Logan finds himself working with his sworn enemy Francis to save all of their lives.

items.title: S01E14 - Stargate
items.summary: Logan and his friends find themselves face to face with heat-loving aliens who are preparing an invasion of Earth.

infolabels.title: Stargate
infolabels.plot: Logan and his friends find themselves face to face with heat-loving aliens who are preparing an invasion of Earth.
